---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new adapter, configuration option, or improvement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the gap or limitation you're running into. What job are you trying to do that heartbeat-gateway doesn't support well today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Adapter requests

If this is a new adapter (e.g. Jira, Slack, PagerDuty, Sentry), please include:
- Which events from that source are actionable vs. noise
- The platform's webhook format and signature verification scheme
- Whether you're willing to contribute the implementation

## Alternatives considered

Have you worked around this with SOUL.md tuning, pre-filter scoping, or other means?

## Additional context

Links to platform webhook docs, example payloads, or related issues.
